name: quack-table
description: Visual explorer for Parquet, CSV, and JSON files with powerful SQL querying, schema inspection, and data statistics powered by DuckDB
author: Arun Pandian R <arunpandian.srk@gmail.com>

quack-table.defaultQuery.markdownDescription: Use `${tableName}` to include the table name of the Parquet file.

quack-table.tableName.markdownDescription: SQL table name associated with the Parquet file. May be overridden by `#quack-table.useFileNameAsTableName#`.

quack-table.useFileNameAsTableName.markdownDescription: Whether the file name is used as the SQL table name of the Parquet file. Overrides `#quack-table.tableName#`.

quack-table.chunkSize.markdownDescription: Number of query results to fetch per request.

quack-table.autoQuery.markdownDescription: Automatically dispatch queries as the input changes. If false, queries are only dispatched on Ctrl + Enter.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: rm -rf ./out; mkdir -p ./out/binding/; cp $(find node_modules -name 'duckdb.node' | head -1) ./out/binding/ 2>/dev/null || true; esbuild ./src/extension.ts --bundle --outfile=out/extension.js --external:vscode --external:nock --external:aws-sdk --external:mock-aws-s3 --external:duckdb --format=cjs --platform=node --minify
